name: Potato Croquettes Stuffed W/Meat
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Ground Beef - Seasoned Bread Crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oil in a deep fryer.
2. Shape the mashed potatoes into balls about the size of small limes. Set aside.
3. In a large skillet, saute the ground beef with butter until browned.
4. Add parsley and green onions during the last minute of cooking. Season with salt, pepper, allspice (add a little cayenne if desired for spiciness). Let cool in a colander until oil has dripped off.
5. Hold one potato ball in one hand. Use the index finger of the other hand to create a hollow center.
6. Fill the hollow with meat mixture. Seal the hole and shape into a patty.
7. Dip each croquette first in the flour (dorure) and then coat with bread crumbs.
8. Deep fry until golden brown.
Note: Do not overfill the potato balls or they may burst during frying.
